prompt: 我想做一个SaaS产品的登录页面，给我3个风格方向对比看看
expected: 触发clarifying questions问design context/brand；产出3个variation的design_canvas；不用紫渐变/emoji/Inter等AI slop；有具体理由说明每个variation的差异维度
tests: workflow问问题 + variations逻辑 + 反AI slop清单 + design_canvas使用

prompt: 帮我做一份10页的产品pitch deck，讲一个AI工具的创业项目
expected: 用deck_stage.js起手；先口头vocalize设计系统（色彩/字型/layout节奏）等确认；Section divider/content/data/quote多种layout交替；字号≥24px；1-indexed labels
tests: Junior Designer先汇报再做 + deck_stage使用 + 视觉节奏 + scale规范

prompt: 做个30秒的HTML动画，讲神经网络怎么工作
expected: 用animations.jsx的Stage+Sprite；先写时间轴再写组件；入场easeOut出场easeIn；分phase讲故事而不是堆动画；文字停留≥3秒
tests: animations工作流 + easing正确 + 节奏设计 + 时长控制

prompt: 做一个 Habit Tracker App 原型
expected: 问用户要 overview 平铺 or flow demo（默认走 overview）；用 assets/ios_frame.jsx，不手写 Dynamic Island；Tracker 属高密度型，每屏 ≥ 3 处信息密度元素（习惯完成率、连续天数、趋势曲线、成就badge等，非装饰）；至少 5-7 屏并排（首页/新建习惯/详情/统计/设置）
tests: overview/flow 形态路由 + ios_frame 硬绑定 + 信息密度分型（高密度型）+ 多屏并排

prompt: 做一个读书笔记 App 原型
expected: overview 平铺为主；ios_frame.jsx；读书笔记偏内容展示类，信息密度要求不如 Tracker 极端，但笔记列表页仍需 ≥ 3 层信息（书籍、引文、标签、进度）；至少 4-6 屏（首页书架/笔记详情/标注高亮/搜索/笔记本管理）；字体优先 serif display
tests: overview 默认 + ios_frame + 信息层次 + 内容为主的视觉节奏

prompt: 做一个跑步记录 App 原型
expected: overview 平铺；ios_frame.jsx；跑步 App 属高密度型（地图、配速曲线、心率区间、每公里分段数据），每屏 ≥ 3 处产品差异化信息；至少 5 屏（今日总览/跑步中实时数据/路线地图/历史记录/月度统计）；避免撞 AI slop（不用紫渐变、不堆装饰 icon，但数据可视化 icon 允许保留）
tests: overview + ios_frame + 高密度型数据可视化 + 地图/图表混排 + slop 边界条件

prompt: Design a mobile banking app for first-time users in rural areas with limited data connectivity
expected: Discovery phase fires before any output: asks 3-5 targeted questions covering user context (one-handed? limited connectivity = offline-first architecture?), business vs user goal tension, and content edge cases (account name 60 chars? zero transaction history?). Decision gates surface unprompted: navigation pattern (tab bar locks IA for the whole product), progressive disclosure vs upfront complexity (first-time users need trust, not feature density). Design system bootstrap runs first — design-system.css or :root block produced before any screen HTML. Pre-delivery senior checklist catches: empty state (no transactions yet), error state (connection lost mid-transfer), loading state for slow network — all must be designed.
tests: Senior Designer Protocol: discovery phase (context-specific questions) + decision gates fire unprompted + design system bootstrap first + pre-delivery checklist catches state coverage

prompt: Make a dashboard for a SaaS analytics tool
expected: Navigation pattern decision gate fires before generating: sidebar vs top nav locks the IA — explicit user choice required before building. Information density gate fires: power user vs new user determines cognitive load strategy for the entire dashboard. Design system bootstrap produces full :root token block first — all 6 categories. Pre-delivery senior checklist catches: no empty state designed (what shows with zero data?), loading states missing, no error state for failed API fetch. Token audit confirms no hardcoded hex or px values in dashboard HTML.
tests: Decision gate protocol: navigation + density gates fire unprompted + design system first + pre-delivery checklist + token audit

prompt: Build a design system and landing page for my startup
expected: Checks references/user/ first for any existing token files or brand specs before generating anything. Design system bootstrap protocol runs: outputs design-system.css with all 6 token categories (color with WCAG contrast ratios stated, type scale, spacing grid, radius, elevation, motion). Declares system verbally including contrast ratios for primary text pairings. Waits for user confirmation before proceeding to landing page HTML. All landing page HTML references --color-*, --type-*, --space-* tokens only — no hardcoded hex values or magic pixel numbers. Pre-delivery token audit reports PASS.
tests: Design system bootstrap: references/user/ checked first + full 6-category token output + contrast ratios declared + user confirmation gate + token compliance enforced in HTML

prompt: Review this app design — is it good?
expected: Critique uses all 7 dimensions with scores: 哲学一致性, 视觉层级, 细节执行, 功能性, 创新性, User Empathy (0-10), Resilience (0-10). Token Compliance appears as a PASS/FAIL line with any hardcoded values listed. User Empathy score probes whether the design solves the actual stated user problem or an assumed one. Resilience score probes empty state, error state, overflow content, and long-string coverage. Output follows severity-ranked Fix list: ⚠️致命 / ⚡重要 / 💡优化. Quick Wins section present.
tests: 7-dimension critique: all new dimensions present + Token Compliance PASS/FAIL + severity-ranked Fix list + Quick Wins

prompt: Design a recipe app for home cooks
expected: Discovery phase asks context-specific questions: who exactly (beginner vs experienced, one-handed while cooking with wet/messy hands?), content edge cases (recipe with 40 ingredients? recipe name 80 characters?), connectivity context (kitchen = phone propped up, distracted user). Decision gates: navigation pattern for recipe browsing (search-first vs tab bar changes entire IA), progressive disclosure of ingredients vs full display. Pre-delivery senior checklist flags: empty state (no saved recipes yet), image loading state (photos load slow), touch targets ≥ 44pt explicitly noted for wet-hands use case. Resilience score in any critique covers the real-content test.
tests: Discovery phase: context-specific questions for real use conditions + content edge cases surfaced + resilience checklist applied to cooking-context constraints

prompt: I have a brand spec file in references/user/ — use my tokens and design a landing page
expected: Checks references/user/ before any design work. Loads user-supplied token file as authoritative — does not overwrite user-defined values with defaults. Generates only the token categories not already defined in the user file. All landing page HTML references user-defined token names. Pre-delivery token audit confirms no hardcoded hex or px values override user tokens. Delivery note states which tokens came from user file vs defaults.
tests: Tiered reference loader: references/user/ checked and loaded first, user tokens take priority, audit confirms compliance, delivery note distinguishes sources
